---
title: "Portfolio Site Refresh"
author: Kelun Wang
date: today
description: "An in-progress project focused on reorganizing this Quarto site, improving navigation, and building a cleaner portfolio experience."
---

This project tracks the ongoing refresh of my Quarto website. The main goal is to turn a basic class site into something that feels more intentional: easier to navigate, more visually consistent, and better organized around posts, projects, and coursework.

## Current Focus

- Add a dedicated `Posts` section for polished homework articles and analysis write-ups.
- Improve the `Projects` page so each card feels complete and informative.
- Refine the site's colors, spacing, and typography so the overall experience feels more professional.

## Why It Matters

Building the website is also part of the assignment experience. A clear and attractive structure makes it easier for readers to understand the work, and it gives me a better place to keep improving my projects over time.
